message:
refactor(mcp): extend framework import isolation to mcp_proxy and mcp_resources (ft-181uk)

Continue the fastmcp import isolation work started in 602ca909:

mcp_proxy.rs: Expand the mcp_proxy_framework module from just
ServerBuilder to the full set of framework types (Content, McpContext,
McpError, McpResult, Server, Tool, ToolHandler). Replace `use super::*`
with explicit imports from the framework alias module, mcp_middleware,
and crate::config.

mcp_resources.rs: Add new mcp_resources_framework module with the same
alias pattern for Resource, ResourceContent, ResourceHandler,
ResourceTemplate, and other types. Replace `use super::*` with
explicit imports from the framework module and specific tool types
from mcp_tools.

This completes the import isolation across all MCP modules, fully
hiding the fastmcp crate boundary behind per-module framework shims.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
